evaluator_insights.insight: Investment promotion RFPs value international benchmarking heavily
evaluator_insights.implication: Proposals must reference leading IPAs and export promotion agencies
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Include KOTRA, Enterprise Singapore, Business France, UKTI as benchmark models

evaluator_insights.insight: Service portfolio design is the core deliverable
evaluator_insights.implication: Methodology must demonstrate service design expertise, not just strategy
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Include service design frameworks: service blueprinting, journey mapping, SLA design

methodology_patterns.when_to_use: Service portfolio development and client journey design

benchmark_references.relevance: 127 offices in 84 countries, comprehensive export support model
SME internationalization readiness model with staged support
Export insurance + advisory + market intelligence model
Digital-first export support with GREAT campaign branding
Comprehensive trade and investment promotion with strong research arm

recommended_search_queries: investment promotion agency service design framework
forbidden_assumptions: Do NOT assume all companies need the same level of support — segmentation is critical
Do NOT assume export readiness — assessment must come before service design
Do NOT conflate inbound investment promotion with outbound export support
